title: Journey A Stage 1 — Lead Capture Output
description: Lead form submission with qualification score and next action routing

qualified.description: Whether lead meets baseline qualification criteria (ICP match, budget, timeline)

score.description: Lead score 0-100. If qualified=true, score must be >=60. If qualified=false, score must be <=40

reasoning.description: Explanation of qualification decision (why this lead scores X, what factors drove decision)

next_action.description: Routing decision for next step in journey
